## Which existing category is closest?

- [ ] Hallucinated output
- [ ] Recursive invention
- [ ] Loop behavior
- [ ] Learned helplessness
- [ ] Overcorrection / paralysis
- [ ] Verification loop
- [ ] False memory claim
- [ ] Passive regurgitation
- [ ] Partial verification declared complete
- [ ] Passive closure
- [ ] Scope drift
- [ ] Unsafe action without authorization
- [ ] New category
